heading: Tonight
text: Mostly clear overnight, with some fog developing in the valleys. Lows in the 40s, a few low 50s southwest. Calm wind.

heading: Saturday
text: Sunshine, mixing with clouds east of the Greens, becoming mostly cloudy west. Highs in the 60s in the sun, in the 50s under cloudy skies. Southeast wind increasing to 10 to 15 mph, gusting 20 mph east, up to 35 mph from the Green Mountains west.

heading: Saturday Night
text: Mostly cloudy, with showers spreading east. Lows in the 40s. South wind at 10 to 15 mph, gusting 20 mph northeast, up to 35 mph west of the Greens, decreasing overnight.
